<!-- Generated by Ralph planning loop — do not edit manually during active loop -->

<!--
  Strict format — every level uses "- [ ]" checkboxes.

  GOAL (top-level):
  - [ ] Goal description

  EPIC (child of goal):
    - [ ] Epic description

  TASK (child of epic):
      - [ ] Task description
        - [ ] Acceptance criterion
        - [ ] Acceptance criterion

  Example:

  - [ ] User authentication system
    - [ ] User registration
      - [ ] Implement registration endpoint
        - [ ] Empty form returns 400 with validation errors
        - [ ] Duplicate email returns 409 with clear message
        - [ ] Successful registration returns 201 with user ID
      - [ ] Implement email verification
        - [ ] Verification email sent within 5 seconds of registration
        - [ ] Expired token returns 410 with re-send option
        - [ ] Already-verified user returns 200 idempotently
    - [ ] User login
      - [ ] Implement login endpoint
        - [ ] Wrong password returns 401 after constant-time check
        - [ ] Locked account returns 423 with unlock instructions
        - [ ] Successful login returns JWT with 1-hour expiry

  Rules:
  - Every task (3rd level) MUST have acceptance criteria (4th level)
  - Criteria must be specific and verifiable, not vague
  - Check off criteria as they are verified, then check off the task
  - Check off epics when all tasks complete, goals when all epics complete
-->
